title: Kaydicraft CIT
description: a custom item resource pack that adds some cottagecore/vintage inspired furniture to Minecraft
body:
This is a CIT (Custom Item Textures) pack for Minecraft that adds cottagecore and vintage inspired furniture/home decor.

### Catalogue
Item catalogue is here: [Kaydicraft CIT catalogue](https://kaydicraft.carrd.co/#citcatalogue)


### Requirements:
To be able to view the models, you'll need Optifine or CIT Resewn.


### Notes:
- The wood items will take on the textures of whatever pack you have installed. In the screenshots, I've used [Mizunos 16 craft as well as their invisible item frames.](https://mizunomcmemo.blogspot.com/p/resourcepack.html)
- This pack has been tested on versions 1.16.5, 1.18.2, 1.19.2 & 1.20.1 but should work on other versions as well.

### Credits:
Credits to texture packs, other CIT items and shaders used in screenshots go to: Mizunos, Ghoulcraft, Hananacraft, BSL Shaders, Garden Breeze, Granny's Corner, Heritage CIT, Moondrop CIT.
